zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Rempston於1389年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾雷普斯同時，他的父親Sir Thomas Rempston24歲，母親Isabel Leeke19歲。他於大約1419年與Alice Bekering在英國林可爾史爾貝寧頓結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他於1416年被列為member of parliament for nottinghamshire。他去世於1458年10月15日享年69歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾賓厄姆三世。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Rempston于1389年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾雷普斯同时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Rempston24岁，母亲Isabel Leeke19岁。他于大约1419年与Alice Bekering在英国林可爾史爾貝寧頓结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他于1416年被列为member of parliament for nottinghamshire。他去世于1458年10月15日享年69岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾賓厄姆三世。

nameMeanings.name: Rempston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Kempson
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): variant of Kempston, a habitational name from Kempston (Bedfordshire), named from an earlier placename Cembes (derived from British cambo- ‘crooked, bent’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Rempston was born in 1389, in Rempstone, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Rempston, was 24 and his mother, Isabel Leeke, was 19. He married Alice Bekering about 1419, in Benington, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. In 1416, at the age of 27, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for nottinghamshire. He died on 15 October 1458, at the age of 69, and was buried in Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Rempston est né en 1389, à Rempstone, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Rempston, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel Leeke, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice Bekering environ 1419, à Benington, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. En 1416, à l’âge de 27 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for nottinghamshire. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1458, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Rempston 1389 in Rempstone, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Rempston 24 und seine Mutter Isabel Leeke 19. Er hat um 1419 in Benington, Lincolnshire, England Alice Bekering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. 1416, als er 27 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament for nottinghamshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1458 im Alter von 69 Jahren und wurde in Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Rempston è nato il nel 1389 nel Rempstone, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Rempston, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Leeke, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice Bekering circa 1419, nel Benington, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Nel 1416, all'età di 27 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for nottinghamshire. Morì il 15 ottobre 1458, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Rempstonが1389年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアレンプストーンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Rempstonは24歳，母Isabel Leekeは19歳であった。約1419年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアベニントンでAlice Bekeringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。1416年，27歳の時，職業はmember of parliament for nottinghamshireと記録されている。彼は1458年10月15日に69歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアビンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Rempston(이)가 1389년 영국 노틴그함실르 렘프스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Rempston(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Leeke(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1419년 영국 링코실르 베닝턴에서 Alice Bekering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1416년, 27세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament for nottinghamshire이었다. 그는 1458년 10월 15일 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 빙함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Rempston nasceu em 1389, em Rempstone, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Rempston, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Leeke, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Bekering aproximadamente 1419, em Benington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Em 1416, com 27 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for nottinghamshire. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1458, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Rempston родился в 1389 г. в местности ремпстоун, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Rempston было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Leeke, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Bekering около 1419 г. в местности бенингтон, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. В 1416 году, в возрасте 27 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament for nottinghamshire. Он умер 15 октября 1458 г. в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности бингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Rempston nació en 1389, en Rempstone, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Rempston, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel Leeke, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice Bekering aproximadamente 1419, en Benington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. En 1416, a la edad de 27 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for nottinghamshire. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1458, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
